prompt: I need to compare all the CAD IG sector spreads: fins, non-fins, utilities, A-rated, BBB-rated, plus the provincial spreads. Give me all of them in a single DataFrame, daily, from 2010 onwards. Write the Python code.
assertions: The code fetches at least 5 of the 6 CAD sector tickers (fins, non-fins, uts, A, BBB, provs)
All sector tickers use INDEX_OAS_TSY_BP as the Bloomberg field
The result is a single merged DataFrame (not separate Series objects)
The code uses 2010 or earlier as the start date
The sector columns are correctly named or labeled (not just numeric indices)
